title: Product Owner - Data Analytics (m/w/d)
required_skills: 3-5 years experience as Product Owner or Product Manager with data analytics focus
KPI framework design and customer tracking
Data governance understanding and data-driven decision making
Backlog management and user story writing
Stakeholder interface between business and technology
bonus_skills: UX principles and UX/UI collaboration experience
matched_skills: KPI framework design — HSBC: burn-rate dashboards and KPI reporting for 6 workstreams; Hapag-Lloyd: KPI reporting and sprint review reports
Agile / Scrum — Hapag-Lloyd: agile sprint coordination, JIRA and Confluence usage
Data visualization — Power BI PL-300 certified, Google Looker Studio
Stakeholder management — C-suite reporting at HSBC, coordinating across tech and business teams
Backlog and workflow management — JIRA-based sprint management at Hapag-Lloyd
Structured analytical approach — ECE Group: competitive analysis and market sizing
English C1 — meets language requirement; German B1 (below preferred level)
Executive-ready report creation — multiple roles producing executive-ready analysis
missing_skills: Product ownership experience (ownership of analytics tool roadmap, releases)
A/B testing and experiment design for digital products
Analytics platforms (Google Analytics, Marfeel) product management
German at required very good level (B1 only)
Data governance and scalable metrics architecture
core_responsibilities: Own and manage analytics tools (Google Analytics, Marfeel) and A/B testing infrastructure end-to-end
Develop analytics product roadmap and manage releases from concept to go-live
Define, implement, and monitor KPIs for customer behavior tracking along the full journey
Design, run, and evaluate digital experiments (onboarding, pricing, targeting)
Translate business, data, and user needs into user stories and acceptance criteria
Act as central interface between business and engineering teams
Monitor industry trends and translate into prioritized product recommendations
recommended_emphasis: Power BI PL-300 certification and Google Looker Studio as data analytics tooling credentials
HSBC KPI dashboard design and Hapag-Lloyd KPI reporting as product analytics mindset evidence
JIRA-based backlog and sprint management from Hapag-Lloyd as agile product owner process experience
ECE Group competitive analysis as structured data-to-insight capability
summary: Scoring 40.9, this is a weak match. The Product Owner Data Analytics role requires dedicated product ownership of analytics tools, A/B testing expertise, and strong German language (below Boru's B1 level). Boru's strong suits — KPI dashboard design, Power BI/Looker Studio, agile coordination with JIRA, and executive reporting — partially align with the analytics mindset required. However, the gap lies in digital product ownership (roadmap, releases, A/B testing) and German proficiency. Application may be considered as a cross-functional stretch with emphasis on analytics visualization and KPI governance strengths.
